verses.text: Tua ahih leh Pasian in ama mi Israel-te nialin nusia mangkhin ahi hiam? Tua bang hi deklo hi. Keimahmah zong Abraham' suan Israel mite ka hi a, tua sung panin Benjamin' suan ka hi hi
Pasian in tanglai panin a teelsa mite nusialo hi. Elijah in Israel mite mawhsakin Pasian kiangah nakpi takin thu a genna Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh theilo na hi uh hiam
Tua sungah, “Topa aw, Israel mite in na kamsangte thatin nangmah biakna taute phelin susiagawp uh a, kei bekbek ka omlai hi. Kei nangawn thah hong sawm lai uh hi,” ci-in kigelh hi
Ahi zongin Pasian in, “Baal milim a bia nailo mihing tul sagih ka nei lai hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua mah bangin tuhunin zong Pasian in ama hehpihna tawh a teelsa mi tawmkhat omlai hi
A teelna-ah mite' nasepna bulphuhin a teel hiloin ama dikna hangin a teel hizaw hi. Pasian in mihingte' nasepna bulphuhin a teel hi leh Pasian' dikna pen dikna kici theilo ding hi
A thu omzia taktak hih bang ahi hi. Israel mi a tamzaw in a hanciamciam uh ngahlo uh hi. Pasian' teel mi tawmkhat bek in ngah uh a, adangte in Pasian' sapna thudonlo uh hi
Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah, “Pasian in thu a ngaihsun theilo, khua a phawk theiloin amaute bawl a, amaute in tuni dongin khua mu theilo, khua za theiloin a om uh hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi
Tua ciangin David in zong, “Amaute in a pawi bawlnate uh awklawh uh hen la, kiat lawhin gimna ngahlawh uh hen
Khua a muhlohna dingun a mit uh taw hen la, lungkhamna vangik lelin awn tawntung ta uh hen!” ci-in a gen lai hi.

Jew mite a puk uh ciangin sia paisuak ahi uh hiam? Sia paisuaklo uh hi. Amau' mawhna hangin Gentail mite in hotkhiatna ngah uh hi. Gentail mite in hotkhiatna a ngah pen Jew mite in en'na lungsim a neihtheihna ding uh deihna ahi hi

Jew mite' mawhna pen leitung khempeuh thupha ngahna suak a, amau' gitnat lohna pen Gentail mite' hamphatna suak ahih leh Jew mi khempeuh in hotkhiatna a ngahkim uh ciangin bangzahin hoihkan ding ahi hiam
Tu-in no Gentail mite tungah thu ka hong gennuam hi: No Gentail mite-a' dingin sawltak ka sep sungteng ka nasep a thupi mahmahin ka ngaihsun ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mipihte in note hong en'theihna ding uh piangsak thei-in, tua manin amaute pawlkhat in hotkhiatna a ngahna ding uh piangsakzo kha dingin ka kilamen hi
Amaute a kinialna hangin Pasian tawh leitung mi khempeuh kipawl theihna piang ahih leh amaute a kisan' hun ciangin a sisate nangawn a hin'kikna hong hita ding hi

Anlum a ki-em masa sung panin a themkhat Pasian biakna-in a kipiak ciangin a anlum buppi zong Pasian-a' mah hi pah a, singkung khat' zung zong Pasian a kipiak ciangin a hiang khempeuh zong Pasian-a' mah ahi hi
A kicing oliv kung a hiangte kisatkhia-in gamlak oliv hiangte tawh kipeh hi. No Gentailte pen tua gamlak oliv hiangte tawh a kibang na hi uh a, Jew mite' hamphatna teng a ngahkhawm na hi uh hi

Tua ahih manin oliv hiang a kisatkhia tawh a kibang Jew mite simmawhbawl kha kei un. Note na kiphatsak theihna ding uh a thu omlo hi. Note pen a hiang tawh a kibang lel na hi uh a, note in a zungpi a hingsak hiloin, a zungpi in note a hong hingsak ahi zaw hi
Note in, “Eite tawh hong kipeh theihna dingin a hiangte a kisatkhia ahi hi,” na cinuam ding uh hi

Tua pen thuman ahi hi. Amaute in a uplohna hangun a kisatkhia hi a, note in na upna hangun amaute' munah a om na hi uh hi. Tua ahih manin kiphatsakna lungsim nei kei un la, lamdang sakna tawh om khikhe zaw un
Pasian in oliv hiang ngeite dawmlo ahih leh note hong dawm tuanlo ding hi

Hih thu-ah Pasian a migit mahmahna leh a khauh mahmahna i mu hi. A khial mite tungah khauh mahmah a, ama migitna a kizop paisuak theihna dingin na up paisuak nak uh leh note tungah hong migi mahmah hi. Ahi zongin na zop paisuak kei uh leh note zong hong kisatkhia ding hi
Tua ciangin Jew mite in zong a lungsim uh kheelin Pasian a up uh leh Pasian in a pehkik theihna ding vangliatna nei ahih manin amaute zong amau' mun ngei mahah pehkik ding hi

Note pen na pian'ngei uh gamlak oliv kung panin hong kisatkhia-in note' pian'ngei a hilo a kicing oliv kung tungah hong kipehthei ahih leh a kicing oliv kung panin a kisatkhia tawh a kibang Jew mite pen Pasian in amau omna ngei-ah a pehkikding olzaw mahmah lai ding hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Israel Mite A Ngei A Batkikna

verses.text: Sanggamte aw, note in na theih dingun ka deih thusim khat om hi. Thei le uh cin, “A pil mahmah hi hang,” na kici nawn kei pah ding uh hi. Tua thu in: Israel mite in a up noplohna pen a tawntung ding thu hilo hi. Pasian kiangah Gentail mite a pai dingzah in Pasian a zuat hun ciangdong ding bek ahi hi

Tua hi a, Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin Israel mite khempeuh in hotkhiatna ngah ding uh hi. Lai Siangtho in, “Zion panin Honpa hong pai ding a, Jakob' suanlekhakte sunga om gitlohna khempeuh maisak ding hi
Amaute' mawhna ka maisak ciangin hih ka thuciamna ka pia ding hi,” ci-in gen hi

Jew mite in Lungdamna Thu umloin Pasian' gal ahihna pen no Gentail mite' hamphatna ding hi a, ahi zongin Pasian' teelna tawh kisai-in a pupite uh tungah a thuciamna huhau-in Pasian' pawlte mah hi lai veve uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in a teel mite leh thupha a piak mite tawh kisai-in a thu dokkiklo hi
No Gentail mite in a beisa hunah Pasian' thu na mang kei uh a, ahi zongin Jew mite' thuman'lohna hangin tu-in Pasian' hehpihna na ngah uh hi
Tua mah bangin amaute' thuman'lohna hangin note in Pasian' hehpihna na ngahna uh pen Jew mite in zong Pasian' hehpihna a ngahkik theihna ding uh ahi hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in mi khempeuh tungah hehpihna a piaktheihna dingin a thuman'lohna hangun mi khempeuh thongkia a bangsak hi
Tua ahih manin Pasian' hong hehpihna nakliat mahmah a, a pilna leh a thu theihnate nakthuk mahmah hi. Ama thukhennate kua' gentheih ding hilo a, a nasepna ziate kua' telzawh ding hilo hi
Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho in, “Kua in Topa' lungsim thei ding a, kua in ngaihsutna va pia thei ding ahi hiam
Amah in hong thukkik theihna dingin kuamah in ama tungah thupha va bawl ngeilo hi,” na ci hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh na khempeuh ama pian'sak hi a, na khempeuh ama hang leh ama minthan'na ding bekin a om ahi hi. Mi khempeuh in Pasian phat tawntung ta hen! Amen.
